历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1576 → 2259 → 3615 → 4501 → 7345, with a continuous decline for 5 consecutive years. The cumulative decline over the past 3 years is about 5090 places, and in 2025, there was a significant decline of about 2844 places compared to 2024, with the decline rate notably expanding. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7345. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for science/physics category were 55, 54, 56, 61, and 56 respectively. The 2026 plan is 59, an increase of 3 (5.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, it ranked 8th from 2021 to 2024 and 9th from 2025 to 2026, consistently among the top ten nationally, making it a top-tier comprehensive university. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly involving the national first-place ranking of its canteens and high admission transparency. Its Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. There have been no records of admission gaps or abnormal admissions in recent years, and the application psychology is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, and Control Science and Engineering A, which highly correspond to the enrollment majors, indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for HUST's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remains consistently high and recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% compared to 2025 (about 172,000), slightly easing competition. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Hubei Province, and its enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (2025), which is an inter-provincial enrollment with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant decline in historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (5.4%), and the decrease in the number of local candidates (about -3%), both supply and demand indicate slightly eased competition and a continued increase in ranking numbers. However, as a top ten national 985 university, the room for ranking decline is limited, and the decline rate is expected to slow down. Based on the 2025 baseline of 7345, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7631, with a range of 7131 to 8131.

If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (≥8131), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 华中科技大学在黑龙江省医学类近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年864名（计划6人）、2022年731名（计划6人）、2023年3615名（计划16人）、2024年4501名（计划21人）、2 025年6983名（计划24人）。位次呈现持续大幅上升趋势，从2021年的864名攀升至2025年的6983名，五年间上涨了6119名，年均增幅显著。2026年医学类招生计划为25人，较2025 年的24人扩招1人，扩招幅度约4.17%，扩招力度较小，对位次的缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校。学校位于湖北省武汉市，综合实力强劲，其同济医学院在国内医 学领域享有盛誉，临床医学、预防医学等学科实力突出，对黑龙江省考生具有很强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来全国范围内医学类专业报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等专业尤为突出。华中科技大学同济医学院作为国内顶尖医学院之一，在黑龙江省的医学类招生规模从202 1年的6人逐步扩大至2025年的24人，2026年进一步增至25人，招生规模扩大但位次仍持续攀升，反映出医学类专业在黑龙江省的竞争日益激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年医学位次持续上升的趋势，预测2026年华中科技大学在黑龙江省医学类最低录取位次约为7188名，位次区间为6936至7440名。相较于2025年的698 3名，位次略有上升（数字增大），表明录取难度略有增加，这与医学热度持续高涨的趋势一致。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in the medical category in Heilongjiang Province over the past five years are: 864th in 2021 (planned 6 students), 731st in 2022 (planned 6 students), 3615th in 2023 (planned 16 students), 4501st in 2024 (planned 21 students), and 6983rd in 2025 (planned 24 students). The rankings have shown a continuous and significant upward trend, rising from 864th in 2021 to 6983rd in 2025, an increase of 6119 places over five years, with a notable average annual increase. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 25 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 24 in 2025, an expansion rate of about 4.17%, which is relatively small and has limited effect on alleviating the ranking pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected into the national Double First-Class construction university. Located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, the university has strong comprehensive strength. Its Tongji Medical College enjoys a high reputation in the domestic medical field, with outstanding disciplines such as clinical medicine and preventive medicine, which strongly attract candidates from Heilongjiang Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise, especially in clinical medicine and stomatology. As one of the top medical colleges in China, Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Tongji Medical College has gradually expanded its medical enrollment in Heilongjiang Province from 6 students in 2021 to 24 students in 2025, and further to 25 students in 2026. Despite the expansion, rankings continue to climb, reflecting the increasingly fierce competition for medical majors in Heilongjiang Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and the recent trend of continuously rising medical rankings, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in the medical category in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 will be approximately 7188th, with a ranking range of 6936 to 7440. Compared to 6983rd in 2025, the ranking has slightly increased (numerical increase), indicating a slight increase in admission difficulty, consistent with the trend of sustained high popularity in medicine.

- Clinical Medicine

- Preventive Medicine (Qiming Experimental Class)
